title: OpenAI employees hint at a new omni model
summary: A new omni model from OpenAI? Employee posts and a leaked audio project called "BiDi" suggest the company is working on its next big multimodal upgrade. The article OpenAI employees hint at a new omni model appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Omni-C: Compressing Heterogeneous Modalities into a Single Dense Encoder
summary: arXiv:2603.05528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent multimodal systems often rely on separate expert modality encoders which cause linearly scaling complexity and computational overhead with added modalities. title: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
OpenAI plans to acquire Promptfoo and bake AI security testing directly into its Frontier enterprise platform
summary: OpenAI is acquiring AI security platform Promptfoo to build automated vulnerability testing, covering jailbreaks, prompt injections, and data leaks, directly into its Frontier enterprise platform. The article OpenAI plans to acquire Promptfoo and bake AI security testing directly into its Frontier enterprise platform appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Nvidia Is Planning to Launch an Open-Source AI Agent Platform
summary: Ahead of its annual developer conference, Nvidia is readying a new approach to software that embraces AI agents similar to OpenClaw.
